recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: Would You Rather
recommendations.overview: Desperate to help her ailing brother, a young woman agrees to compete in a deadly game of "Would You Rather" hosted by a sadistic aristocrat.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: Don't Listen
recommendations.overview: After a tragic turn of events at the new home he's fixing up, Daniel hears a ghostly plea for help, spurring him to seek out a famous paranormal expert.

recommendations.title: The Town that Dreaded Sundown
recommendations.overview: A masked maniac terrorizes the same small community where a murderer known as the Phantom Killer struck decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Curtains
recommendations.overview: Six young actresses auditioning for a movie role at a remote mansion are targeted by a mysterious masked murderer.

recommendations.title: The Zodiac
recommendations.overview: An elusive serial killer known as the Zodiac terrorizes the San Francisco Bay in the late 1960s, while detectives aim to stop him before he claims more victims. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: All Fun and Games
recommendations.overview: A group of Salem teens discover a cursed knife that unleashes a demon that forces them to play gruesome, deadly versions of childhood games where there can be no winners, only survivors.

recommendations.title: M3GAN 2.0
